results.title: E2B Desktop Sandbox SDK
results.description: The E2B Desktop Sandbox SDK provides programmatic access to secure, open-source virtual desktops, enabling users to create, launch applications, and stream virtual computer environments for AI agents and other automated tasks.

results.title: E2B JavaScript SDK
results.description: The E2B JavaScript SDK allows developers to interact with E2B sandboxes, run commands, manage files, and connect to running processes within the sandbox environment.

results.title: E2B Cookbook
results.description: Example code and guides for building with the E2B SDK, showcasing various LLM providers and use cases like data analysis and code interpretation.

results.title: E2B
results.description: E2B is an open-source infrastructure for running AI-generated code in secure, isolated cloud sandboxes, controllable via JavaScript or Python SDKs.

results.title: E2B
results.description: E2B is an open-source infrastructure providing secure, isolated cloud sandboxes (VMs) for running AI-generated code. It enables AI data analysis, code interpretation, and agent environments.

results.title: Code Interpreter
results.description: E2B Code Interpreter is an open-source infrastructure that allows you to run AI-generated code in secure, isolated sandboxes in the cloud, with SDKs available for JavaScript and Python.

results.title: E2B Dashboard
results.description: E2B Dashboard is a modern, feature-rich web application built with Next.js 15 and React 19 to manage and monitor E2B services, providing a seamless user experience for managing sandboxes, API keys, and usage analytics.

results.title: EDK2
results.description: EDK2 is an open-source implementation of the Unified Extensible Firmware Interface (UEFI) specification, providing a comprehensive development environment for firmware.

results.title: EPay SDK PHP V2
results.description: A PHP Software Development Kit (SDK) for integrating with an e-payment system, representing the second version of the library.

results.title: eForms SDK
results.description: The eForms SDK provides resources for building applications to create, edit, visualize, validate, and submit public procurement notices to the TED website, based on UBL 2.3 and Schematron rules.

results.title: E2B Desktop Sandbox
results.description: E2B Desktop Sandbox is an open-source secure virtual desktop that provides isolated, customizable sandboxes for launching applications and streaming their screens, offering features like password protection.

results.title: PancakeSwap V2 SDK
results.description: A comprehensive TypeScript SDK for seamless PancakeSwap V2 trading on BSC, enabling integration of trading, liquidity management, and event monitoring with powerful tools and unified interfaces.

results.title: B2 SDK for Python
results.description: A client library and utilities for easy access to all capabilities of B2 Cloud Storage, enabling various applications like command-line tools and FUSE filesystems.

results.title: Embedded Template Library
results.description: Embedded Template Library

results.title: E2B Infrastructure
results.description: E2B Infrastructure is an open-source platform providing the underlying infrastructure for E2B's AI code interpreting capabilities, supporting self-hosting with Terraform on various cloud providers like GCP and AWS.

results.title: Splash Protocol SDK
results.description: An official Turborepo starter template that includes Next.js apps, a React component library, and ESLint/TypeScript configurations for efficient monorepo management.

results.title: A2A SDK Python
results.description: The A2A SDK Python provides client and server components for interacting with the A2A (Agent-to-Agent) communication protocol, enabling messaging, task management, and agent execution.

results.title: Fragments
results.description: Fragments is an open-source platform for building AI-powered applications, similar to Claude Artifacts or v0, that securely executes AI-generated code using the E2B SDK.

results.title: Drift Protocol v2 SDK
results.description: The Drift Protocol v2 SDK is a TypeScript library for interacting with the Drift Protocol v2 on Solana, providing tools for account management, collateral deposits, and placing market orders.

results.title: App Template
results.description: A project template for quickly setting up embedded projects using probe-rs, defmt, and flip-link.

results.title: Signwell TypeScript SDK
results.description: A TypeScript SDK for seamless integration with the SignWell e-signature API, enabling developers to programmatically manage documents, bulk sends, templates, and webhooks.

results.title: Circles SDK v2
results.description: A comprehensive TypeScript SDK providing contract interaction, RPC client for data queries, and utility packages for the Circles protocol.

results.title: PHP SDK for Maib E-commerce API
results.description: A PHP SDK for the Maib ecommerce API, enabling developers to integrate payment processing, including direct payments, two-step payments, refunds, and recurring payments.

results.title: Proyecto 9B FE
results.description: Proyecto 9B FE is a front-end application built using the React + Vite template, offering a minimal setup with Hot Module Replacement (HMR) and ESLint rules for development.

results.title: TRMNL Framework v2
results.description: TRMNL Framework v2 is a design system framework offering utilities and components for creating responsive and device-aware interfaces, optimized for e-ink displays.

results.title: Circles SDK v2
results.description: A comprehensive TypeScript SDK providing contract wrappers, RPC client, types, and utilities for interacting with the Circles protocol.

results.title: MDK2
results.description: A toolkit for developing programmable block scripts and mods for Space Engineers, offering a Visual Studio project setup, disallowed code checks, and a script minifier.

results.title: Embabel Kotlin Agent Template
results.description: An agent repository template generated by the Embabel project creator, designed for building AI agents in Kotlin that orchestrate Large Language Models (LLMs) for tasks like content generation and review.

results.title: Template Toolkit
results.description: The Template Toolkit is a fast, flexible, powerful, and extensible template processing system for generating dynamic web content and other text-based documents like HTML, XML, and LaTeX.

results.title: Unitree B2 SDK
results.description: The Unitree B2 SDK is a development kit that provides motion control interfaces and state monitoring for the B2 quadruped robot, enabling developers to control movement, posture, and receive real-time motion state data.
